required_contains.text: The two private keys are also not protected the same way at rest, and that difference has a transfer
consequence. The key documentation states that by default the coldkey is encrypted on disk while the
hotkey is not, so the hotkey's signing key sits in plaintext on the operational machine unless it is
explicitly encrypted when created. Because the hotkey is that exposed operational key, the wallet
guidance warns that sending TAO to a hotkey runs contrary to the design and can irreversibly lose
the funds, so transfers of TAO should always go to a coldkey
